data.content: Implemented includeDescendantsOfQueueParents in both knots-backend and beads-backend applyFilters. When using phase filters (queued/in_action), all descendants of beats in queue states are now included regardless of their own state. Added 4 tests covering: basic parent-child inclusion, deep nesting, in_action filter, and non-phase-filter exclusion. Branch: worktree-ce5a-queue-children.
